message:
fix(api,connector,runtime,security,tools): replay window off-by-one, lockstep directory entrypoint resolution, verifier SDK hardening, and test idiom cleanup

api/fleet_quarantine.rs, api/service.rs, api/session_auth.rs:
- Replaced panic!() with unreachable!() in test error-match arms
  across 14 call sites. These arms handle error variants that the
  test has already constrained to be impossible — unreachable!() is
  semantically correct and communicates the intent more clearly.

connector/control_channel.rs:
- Fixed off-by-one in replay window retention: the retain predicate
  now uses >= min_retained_seq (inclusive) instead of > min_seq,
  preventing the oldest valid sequence from being prematurely evicted.
  This caused sequence 0 to be evicted one message too early when the
  window moved past it.
- Simplified replay window pruning to always retain based on
  min_retained_seq = seq - (window_size - 1) rather than conditionally
  pruning when window.len() exceeds window_size.
- Added test for zero-based sequence replay detection to verify the
  fix.
- Reformatted function signatures and call sites for readability.

connector/verifier_sdk.rs:
- Extended verification checks and reformatted code (details match
  prior verifier SDK hardening pattern).

control_plane/fork_detection.rs, runtime/bounded_mask.rs,
runtime/optimization_governor.rs, security/zk_attestation.rs:
- Minor fixes and formatting improvements.

runtime/lockstep_harness.rs:
- Added directory entrypoint resolution for JS runtimes (node, bun):
  when app_path is a directory, the harness now resolves the
  executable entry via package.json "main" field (with extension and
  subdirectory fallbacks) or conventional index.{js,mjs,cjs} files.
  Previously, passing a project directory to node/bun would fail with
  a cryptic runtime error.
- Added resolve_runtime_target(), resolve_directory_entrypoint(), and
  resolve_entry_candidate() methods with comprehensive tests.

tools/profile_tuning_harness.rs:
- Refactored profile tuning logic for clarity.

tests/integration/control_channel_replay.rs:
- Extended replay integration test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
